final_prompt.prompt:
Create a luxury product shot of a high-end Swiss tourbillon wristwatch for commercial editorial use.

Style/medium: luxury commercial product photography, macro still life, photorealistic
Composition: macro close-up at 90 degrees overhead, table-top flat lay, shallow depth of field with focus on tourbillon mechanism
Subject: 42mm tourbillon wristwatch with skeleton dial exposing movement, 18K rose gold case, diamond-set bezel, dark brown crocodile leather strap
Scene/backdrop: dark carbon fiber textured surface, heavily blurred background
Lighting/mood: multi-angle softbox lighting, even highlights on metal surfaces without overexposure, precise detail on mechanical components
Color palette: warm rose gold as anchor, deep brown leather, dark carbon gray, diamond sparkle as accent
Materials/textures: brushed 18K rose gold case, diamond facets, genuine crocodile leather grain, exposed mechanical movement with polished steel gears, balance wheel, hairspring, tourbillon cage
Constraints: focus must land precisely on the tourbillon mechanism; color accuracy critical for luxury commercial use
Avoid: plastic textures, overexposed metal, cartoonish rendering, 8K stuffer labels, watermark
